title: verbascum ekicii
intro: Verbascum ekicii, also known as Ekici's mullein, is a species of flowering plant in the mullein genus. It is a biennial plant native to Turkey, known for its medicinal properties and various health benefits. The plant's leaves and flowers have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to their anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Verbascum ekicii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal medicine to soothe skin irritations and reduce fever.
